games.title: Paddle Ball
games.description: Move the paddle with your mouse or finger and keep the ball alive. Every bounce gives you one point.

games.title: Tesseract Match
games.description: Rotate the tesseract with your mouse or finger and use the 4D slider to match the target view as fast as possible.

games.title: Pasture Tactics
games.description: Build your herd, choose one action each turn, survive random events and score as much as possible in 20 turns.
